chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.2403 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs 1. For orders on office objection as at “A” 2. For orders on M.A. No.13998/2024 3. For hearing of bail application ----------------------------------------------------- 10.02.2025 Ms. Zainab Bibi, advocate for applicant Ms. Amna Ansari, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh ------------------------------------ Learned counsel for applicant, after arguing the matter at some length, does not press the instant criminal bail application and seeks direction to the trial Court to conclude the trial, preferably within a period of two months. She further submits that 10 witnesses have been examined by the trial Court and the case is at the verge of conclusion. In view of such position, instant criminal bail application is disposed of with direction to the trial Court to decide the case of applicant/accused, preferably within a period of two months. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
